name: auto-sync-excel
description: Web UI va CLI dong bo du lieu Excel theo mapping cot vat tu.

scripts.sync:sample: node scripts/cli.js --source "C:/Users/truon/Downloads/rp_chiemkhoduoc_intonkho_1780037227.xls" --target "C:/Users/truon/Downloads/Danh mục thuốc hóa chất vtyt,..._.xlsx" --output "outputs/danh-muc-da-dong-bo.xlsx"
scripts.check: node --check scripts/cli.js && node --check server/index.js && node --check server/sync.js && npm run build
